name: @glamfire/cli
description: The glam CLI — the primary surface and dogfooding vehicle for glamfire.

dist.comment: The user-facing npm package is the unscoped `glamfire` (provides the `glam` bin), built self-contained by `scripts/build-npm.mjs`: it bundles this package and its workspace deps with no workspace:* specifiers and no native modules. This @glamfire/cli manifest is the in-repo source; the published manifest is generated by that script.
